title: Strategy report for offering traceable calibration for testing machines under continuous and dynamic forces
author: Sander Jonas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The first part of the document delivers the strategy to amend the developed continuous force calibration procedure of testing machines, in the form of three proposed annexes to the ISO standards ISO 376 and ISO 7500-1 (see figure 1). Details of these two standards are provided together with details of how the proposed annexes could be incorporated. The second part of the document delivers the required strategy to implement the developed calibration procedure for the dynamic calibration of material testing machines within a new guideline document DKD-R 9-4, which uses for traceability the existing standards ISO 376, DKD-R 3-2 and DKD-R 3-10 Sheet 2 (see figure 2). Details of these existing standards are described below, together with details of how the proposed guideline shall be implemented.

Details of these two standards are provided together with details of how the proposed annexes could be incorporated. The second part of the document delivers the required strategy to implement the developed calibration procedure for the dynamic calibration of material testing machines within a new guideline document DKD-R 9-4, which uses for traceability the existing standards ISO 376, DKD-R 3-2 and DKD-R 3-10 Sheet 2 (see figure 2). Details of these existing standards are described below, together with details of how the proposed guideline shall be implemented.
